title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Another strong week in the S&P market, particularly within the dry bulk segment, where fresh benchmark sales emerged at firmer levels. A couple of flagship deals in both the Kamsarmax and Handysize sectors set the tone, highlighting the upward momentum. Demand remains strong across the board, while the limited availability of quality tonnage continues to push asset values.
